edit.title: Edit Pass

videoInfo.title: Title
videoInfo.linkResolved: Short link resolved to Bilibili URL

edit.holdTooltip: Check this if a different hold tile behavior was used (no holding required etc.)
edit.keyCountTooltip: Number of keys used for this pass.
edit.feelingTooltip: How hard it felt for you personally. Valid examples: G1-G5, 17~18+, U1, etc.
edit.expectedTooltip: What difficulty the level should be rated as (optional). Same format as feeling rating.
edit.adofaiV2Tooltip: Check this if the clear was recorded on ADOFAI v2

alert.login: Please log in to submit a pass
alert.form: Please fill in all required fields correctly

confirmations.delete: Do you want to delete this pass? This can be undone later.
confirmations.restore: Do you want to restore this pass?
